# Plan & Build — Skill Group

Core workflow skills for planning, implementing, and fixing code.

## Routing

Read the skill file based on the argument:

| Input | Skill file | What it does |
|-------|-----------|--------------|
| `plan` | `skills/plan.md` | Plan before implementing — structured plan, critique, execute |
| `ultrawork` | `skills/ultrawork.md` | Full task lifecycle: plan -> implement -> verify -> review -> commit |
| `autopilot` or `auto` | `skills/autopilot.md` | Fully autonomous 5-phase pipeline with zero intervention |
| `pipeline` or `stages` | `skills/pipeline.md` | Multi-stage build/deploy pipeline orchestration |
| `ralph` or `fix-loop` | `skills/ralph.md` | Persistent verify-and-fix loop until task is complete |
| `ecomode` or `eco` | `skills/ecomode.md` | Token-efficient mode for simple tasks |
| `tdd` | `skills/tdd.md` | Test-driven development: Red -> Green -> Refactor |
| `build-fix` or `fix` | `skills/build-fix.md` | Auto-fix build, test, or lint failures |
| `deepinit` or `init` | `skills/deepinit.md` | Deep project initialization and scaffolding |

Read the matched skill file and execute its workflow.
